creator: scott@sabmail.rresearch.com
text:
On Fri, Sep 22, 2000 at 12:29:46PM +1100, marka@nominum.com wrote:
> 
> 	Mail is lost if two "inc"s are running at the same time.
> 	This is easy to do in a windowed evirionment specially when you
> 	have multiple mailboxes.

As far as I know, this isn't really a port problem, but a problem with
the base software.  I don't know if MH or nmh has ever done any sort of
"folder" locking or atomic creation of new message files.  I'm pretty
sure that it's never done any locking on the .mh_sequences files.

You might be able to get a response on the nmh-workers@mhost.com
mailing list...

-- 
Scott Blachowicz
